title: Entrepreneurship Awareness Program | GU
content: Event Date: 26th Nov 2025 Event brief description The University Polytechnic, Galgotias University organized an Entrepreneurship Awareness Program (Registration for Internship, Placement and Upskilling). The session was conducted by Mr. Arun Defoe, Assistant Director at MSME (Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India), Mr. Ravi Gupta, Expert Trainer who has trained more than 70,000 students in Entrepreneurship, and Mr. Kapil Kumar Parashar, Director at Vyom Group. The program focused on understanding the entrepreneurial ecosystem in India, industry-oriented internships and placements, skill development pathways for students, and government-supported upskilling opportunities. Speakers emphasized the importance of building future-ready skills, developing an entrepreneurial mindset, and aligning learning with modern industry requirements. Students were also introduced to hackathons, ideathons, internship opportunities, and the step-by-step process of how they can register and participate. The session highlighted the benefits of participating in such initiatives to enhance innovation, teamwork, problem-solving, and career readiness. Event Detailed Description The University Polytechnic, Galgotias University organized an impactful session (Entrepreneurship Awareness – Registration for Internship, Placement & Upskilling), aimed at empowering students with practical exposure to industry opportunities, entrepreneurial development, and career advancement. The session was divided into the following key segments: Entrepreneurship & Startup Ecosystem in India The speakers presented a comprehensive overview of the current and future entrepreneurial landscape in India. Students were introduced to government support systems, MSME schemes, startup incubators, funding opportunities, and the role of innovation in national economic growth. The discussion highlighted how India is emerging as a global hub for innovation, startups, skill development, and industry transformation. Skill Development for Employability and Entrepreneurship Participants were guided on the essential technical and soft skills required to succeed in both corporate jobs and entrepreneurial ventures. The session emphasized skill sets such as communication, problem-solving, leadership, financial literacy, digital technology awareness, creativity, and adaptability. Experts encouraged students to focus on continuous learning to stay relevant in the rapidly evolving professional world. Internship, Placement & Upskilling Roadmap A detailed step-by-step explanation was provided on how students can register for internship programs, industry-based placements, and government-affiliated certification courses. Students were informed about platforms and processes for securing meaningful career opportunities, along with guidance on building a strong professional profile, portfolio, and networking strategy. Hackathons, Ideathons & Innovation Opportunities Students were introduced to hackathons, ideathons, and innovation-driven competitive platforms, designed to encourage creative problem-solving and real-world application of knowledge. The speakers explained how participation in such programs enhances critical thinking, teamwork, research orientation, and industry exposure. Special emphasis was given to innovation-based learning and career building. The session was highly interactive, with students actively engaging in discussions and asking questions related to entrepreneurship, internships, innovation, and professional pathways. By the end of the program, students gained clarity, motivation, and a practical roadmap to align their goals with emerging industry opportunities. Department Name –Galgotias Polytechnic Event Outcome
